_instructions: Copy this folder, rename it to a unique kebab-case slug (e.g. 'my-project'), then fill in all fields. Add the slug to Data/projects.json under 'projects' in display order. Drop images into images/ named 01.jpg, 02.jpg, 03.jpg (4:3 ratio, 1200x900px). Place any report PDF in this folder and set 'report' to its filename. Wrap key numbers in ... in results. Delete this _instructions key before saving.
title: PROJECT TITLE IN UPPERCASE
what: What was the goal or problem being solved?
What system or artifact was built or investigated?
how: What methods, tools, or techniques were used?
Any specific models, software, or fabrication approaches?
results: What was achieved? Use numbers where possible.
Key findings, performance metrics, or outcomes.
